node.name: hakeemy
node.description: This project aims to develop an application and website to facilitate the connection between doctors and patients. The repository includes Android, iOS, and Web with 95%+ code sharing between them. Additionally, it encompasses the backend API designed for this project.

node.name: anime-down-app
node.description: This repository contains the source code for a unique streaming platform, akin to Netflix but exclusively focused on Arabic cartoon movies and series. Our platform is accessible through web browsers, Android, and iOS devices, ensuring a wide range of compatibility and user accessibility.

node.name: kartonah
node.description: Revolutionizing B2B commerce by connecting businesses directly with a comprehensive network of Turkish factories. This platform streamlines the procurement process, offering a vast array of products straight from the source. Ideal for business owners seeking efficient, cost-effective sourcing solutions.
